supported_devices: Irrigation pumps, water pumps, circulation fans, inline fans, outline fans, lights, shade systems, heaters, CO2 valves, humidifiers, dehumidifiers, dosing pumps, irrigation valves, water chillers, misting systems, foggers, air conditioners, solenoid valves, chillers, heating mats, compressors
port_types: 10 built-in relays, 7 analog/digital inputs, 2x USB 2.0, 4 power outlets
compatible_ec_fans: any (relay on/off switching only, no fan speed PWM control)
compatible_lights: any (relay on/off switching only, no integrated dimming)
compatible_sensors: GrowDirector-branded sensors for pH, EC, water temperature, CO2, soil moisture, PAR/LUX, air temperature/humidity; also standard sensors via USB 2.0
recommended_use_note: Standalone all-in-one professional grow controller with integrated 10" touchscreen; discontinued and replaced by GrowDirector 3 PRO (modular wireless) and GrowDirector 4 PRO. Suitable for greenhouse and indoor grows of any size via relay chaining. Sensors beyond included temp/humidity sold separately.
uvp_notes: Sale price at US retailer (Florida Garden Supplies); original list price was $1,655 USD. No EUR price confirmed for German market. Product is discontinued.
notes: Standalone all-in-one controller from Israeli manufacturer Grow Director Ltd. (Ness Ziona). The 2.0 generation featured an integrated 10" IPS touchscreen, 10 built-in relays, 7 analog/digital sensor inputs, 2x USB 2.0 ports, and 4 controlled power outlets. Supports up to 10 zones and up to 8-9 sensors simultaneously. Basic kit ships with air temperature and humidity sensors (2m cable each); pH, EC, CO2, soil moisture, PAR/LUX, water temperature sensors sold separately. Relay control is on/off only — no analog dimming or PWM fan speed without add-on modules. Unit continues to operate locally when internet is unavailable (confirmed by user reports). Discontinued and replaced by GrowDirector 3 PRO (fully wireless modular system with machine learning, launched ~2022-2023) and subsequently GrowDirector 4 PRO (2025). Dimensions and weight sourced from Hungarian retailer playgrowned.com; may vary by regional variant. Not found on Amazon.de.
